title: Violinist has audience in awe
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A violinist impressed the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A violinist impressed the audience at a function at Point High School so much that there was a sense of awe, a hush and many people recorded him on their cellphones.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A violinist impressed the audience at a function at Point High School so much that there was a sense of awe, a hush and many people recorded him on their cellphones."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stéfan Conradie played Por Una Cabeza by Carlos Gardel at the recent function.","html":"Stéfan Conradie played Por Una Cabeza by Carlos Gardel at the recent function."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Conradie (27) is a music teacher at Point High School."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Born and bred in George, he started teaching at Point part time in 2022.","html":"Born and bred in George, he started teaching at Point part time in 2022."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"See a video here: https://youtu.be/6tB-WWCuof0?feature=shared"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He moved to Mossel Bay in 2023 and now teaches fulltime at the school. Conradie, who studied music at the University of Cape Town, also plays the piano.","html":"He moved to Mossel Bay in 2023 and now teaches fulltime at the school. Conradie, who studied music at the University of Cape Town, also plays the piano."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He says: \"I like the romantic period and musicians such as Cesar Frank and Robert Schumann."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"My favourite instrument is the violin. I would never advertise myself as a pianist. I often perform in concerts as part of quartet. We consist of a cellist, two violinists and a viola player.","html":"\"My favourite instrument is the violin. I would never advertise myself as a pianist. I often perform in concerts as part of quartet. We consist of a cellist, two violinists and a viola player."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We played at the Woordfees in Stellenbosch last year as well as the KKNK in Oudtshoorn.\"","html":"\"We played at the Woordfees in Stellenbosch last year as well as the KKNK in Oudtshoorn.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Conradie also performs at weddings and other functions. He was 11 years old when he started playing the violin. He had private tutors mainly, but also did music at school - Outeniqua High.","html":"Conradie also performs at weddings and other functions. He was 11 years old when he started playing the violin. He had private tutors mainly, but also did music at school - Outeniqua High."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay's Zelia le Roux was one of his tutors, as well as a Polish tutor, Karol Legierski.","html":"Mossel Bay's Zelia le Roux was one of his tutors, as well as a Polish tutor, Karol Legierski."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Conradie's advice to budding violinists is: \"Focus on the first finger of your left hand, because it is the basis of intonation.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When he is not teaching or performing, such as at the school function on 23 January, he enjoys motorbiking and fishing.","html":"When he is not teaching or performing, such as at the school function on 23 January, he enjoys motorbiking and fishing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"My wife catches more fish than I do,\" he says with a laugh. \"We often fish at Gansbaai. We use hand lines and catch Cape cod mainly.\"","html":"\"My wife catches more fish than I do,\" he says with a laugh. \"We often fish at Gansbaai. We use hand lines and catch Cape cod mainly.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
